Container.Name: file-converter
Container.Overview: Self-hosted file conversion tool. Convert between documents (DOCX, PDF, MD, HTML, TXT), images (PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, TIFF, BMP, ICO, SVG), audio (MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, AAC, M4A), video (MP4, MKV, AVI, WEBM, MOV, GIF), data (CSV, JSON, XLSX, XML, YAML, TSV), and archives (ZIP, TAR, TAR.GZ, 7Z). No cloud, no tracking.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Stores temporary uploads and converted files. Auto-cleaned after FILE_TTL seconds.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Internal port for the web server. Must match the port mapping above.

Config.Name: FILE_TTL
Config.Description: Seconds before uploaded/converted files are auto-deleted. Default: 86400 (24 hours).

Config.Name: MAX_UPLOAD_SIZE
Config.Description: Maximum upload file size in bytes. Default: 536870912 (512 MB).
